value_rule: Must match a source_id in source-registry.tsv
Must match a source_label in source-registry.tsv
Must be one of core_builtin, optional_adapter, manual_only
Must be one of url, file, text, asset
Must be a relative path under raw/
Store the original URL, file path, or provenance note
Must be non-empty text before entering the main ingest flow
Leave empty for core/manual routes; fill for optional adapters
Must provide a concrete manual fallback for the user
